name: Entrance
notes: Starting room — no secrets here.

name: Spike Room
notes: Watch for spike traps on the floor.

name: Fairy Room
notes: Fairy Soul located inside. Talk to the Fairy to collect.

name: The Blood Room
notes: Defeat The Watcher to open the door.

name: Box Puzzle
notes: Push all wool blocks onto the correct pressure plates.
Order does not matter — just get all blocks in place.

name: Correct Selector
notes: Click the item on the podium that matches the description.
Read the hint text carefully before clicking.

name: Ice Walk
notes: Slide across ice tiles to cover every tile once.
Plan your route before starting — you cannot undo a move.

name: Boulder
notes: Push boulders into holes to fill them all.
Some boulders can be pushed through multiple holes — plan ahead.

name: Blaze Puzzle
notes: Kill blazes in the order of their HP bars: highest HP first.
Check the chat for HP updates as you kill each one.

name: Creeper Puzzle
notes: Place the prismarine blocks to complete the circuit.
Extend the lines from the terminals to meet in the center.

name: Water Board
notes: Adjust levers to match the colored pattern on the board.
Pull all matching levers before stepping on the pressure plate.

name: Tic-Tac-Toe
notes: Play Tic-Tac-Toe against the AI. Win or draw to complete.
Start with the center tile when possible for best odds.

name: Simon Says
notes: Click the levers in the correct order shown by the lights.
Memorize the sequence before starting.

name: Bonzo's Lair
notes: Destroy the snowballs Bonzo throws to stun him.
Jump to dodge the ice-spike attack.

name: Scarf's Room
notes: Kill the spawned mobs in each phase to progress.
Watch for Scarf's teleport — he repositions between phases.

name: The Professor's Room
notes: Destroy the 4 guardian guardians before fighting The Professor.
Guardians respawn if you leave the room — keep pressure on.

name: Thorn's Room
notes: Break the glowstone on the pillars to expose Thorn.
Use range attacks during the vine-grab phase.

name: Livid's Room
notes: Find and kill the REAL Livid — only one of the clones has a name.
Real Livid is darker and has no §c prefix in the name tag.

name: Sadan's Room
notes: Destroy the giant golems in order of their tier (lowest first).
Dodge Sadan's stomp attack — it deals massive knockback.

name: Necron's Hall
notes: Follow the multi-phase order: Maxor → Storm → Goldor → Necron.
Each wither guardian must be defeated before Necron is vulnerable.
